## Summary

<!-- Brief description of the change. Link relevant issues. -->

## DoR Metadata (Required For Scope-Sensitive Changes)

<!--
  Fill in each field below before requesting review.
  Use "N/A" for fields that do not apply to this change.
-->

- story_id=
- acceptance_criteria=
- dependencies=
- feature_flag_decision=
- observability_requirement=
- security_privacy_impact=
- migration_strategy=
- rollback_killswitch_path=

## DoD Evidence Links (Required For Staging-Validated Changes)

<!--
  Provide links/artifacts demonstrating staging validation.
  Use "N/A" for fields that do not apply.
-->

- staging_run_url_or_artifact=
- dashboard_url=
- alerts_url=

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for feat/fix/perf/security)
- [ ] No secrets, hardcoded values, or debug artifacts
